{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 1,

    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The section flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (e.g., 'first' and 'clinically relevant accuracy').",
    "R1.4": "The novelty assessment is incomplete, as it only names one prior work (DrugDock-v1) without articulating the delta.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (the introduction focuses on DrugDock's novelty and performance, but does not clearly address the scope of the paper).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors or fabrications (e.g., 'first' claim is likely overstated); no harm-free evaluation.",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability; major rewrites are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The section flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (e.g., 'first' and 'clinically relevant accuracy').
rationale.R1.4: The novelty assessment is incomplete, as it only names one prior work (DrugDock-v1) without articulating the delta.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (the introduction focuses on DrugDock's novelty and performance, but does not clearly address the scope of the paper).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors or fabrications (e.g., 'first' claim is likely overstated); no harm-free evaluation.
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability; major rewrites are not annotated with source and reason.
